pr.title: [WIP] SP4096: Larger vocabulary for better BPB

output.summary: Switching to a 4096-word SentencePiece BPE reduces tokens per byte and cuts BPB vs 1024 baseline, pending full 8xH100 validation.
techniques: 4096-token SentencePiece BPE reduces tokens/byte vs 1024 vocab
Untied input/output embeddings with separate lrs to stay under 16MB
Tokenizer compression table shows steady tokens_per_byte drop
